name: Thyme and Thyme Again Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Crumbled feta or goat cheese
Garlic clove (or more) - minced or crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a jar.
2. Seal tightly and shake for 10 seconds.
3. Use immediately or refrigerate.
4. If kept refrigerated, the vinaigrette should keep for up to two weeks.
5. Makes 1 cup
